name: Demo Action - Trigger SLA Breach
description: Simulates an SLA breach by updating a case's SLA timer fields and optionally sending warning/violation notifications. Triggered from Demo Execution Guide buttons.

case_number.description: D365 case ticket number to breach

case_id.description: D365 case GUID (use instead of case_number if known)

send_notification.description: Send toast notification to case owner

queries.$filter: @{if(not(empty(triggerBody()?['case_id'])), concat('incidentid eq ', triggerBody()?['case_id']), concat('ticketnumber eq ''', coalesce(triggerBody()?['case_number'], ''), ''''))}

body.description:
@{if(equals(triggerBody()?['breach_type'], 'violated'), '*** SLA BREACHED *** - Immediate action required', '⚠️ SLA Warning - Approaching deadline')}

[Auto-updated by demo simulation at @{utcNow()}]

body.title: @{if(equals(triggerBody()?['breach_type'], 'violated'), '🚨 SLA BREACHED', '⚠️ SLA Warning')}
body.body: @{if(equals(triggerBody()?['breach_type'], 'violated'), concat('CRITICAL: Case ', variables('caseRecord')?['ticketnumber'], ' (', variables('caseRecord')?['title'], ') has BREACHED SLA. Immediate action required.'), concat('Case ', variables('caseRecord')?['ticketnumber'], ' (', variables('caseRecord')?['title'], ') is approaching SLA deadline. Please respond soon.'))}

breach_types.warning: Sets case to high priority, sends Warning (yellow) toast
breach_types.violated: Sets case to high priority, sends Failure (red) toast

setup_steps: 1. Create new Instant Cloud Flow in Power Automate
2. Add trigger: 'When an HTTP request is received' — paste the schema above
3. Add action: 'List rows' from Dataverse — incidents table to find the case
4. Add action: 'Update a row' from Dataverse — incidents table to set priority/description
5. Add condition: if send_notification is true
6. Inside condition: Add action 'Add a new row' — appnotifications table
7. Add action: 'Response' — return JSON with status
8. Save and copy the HTTP POST URL
9. Paste URL into Demo Control Panel > Flow Configuration > SLA Breach URL
